endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits
endpoints.description: Creates a new edit for an app, populated with the app's current state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}
endpoints.description: Returns information about the edit specified. Calls will fail if the edit is no long active (e.g. has been deleted, superseded or expired).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{packageName}/edits/{editId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an edit for an app. Creating a new edit will automatically delete any of your previous edits so this method need only be called if you want to preemptively abandon an edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/externallyHosted
endpoints.description: Creates a new APK without uploading the APK itself to Google Play, instead hosting the APK at a specified URL. This function is only available to enterprises using Google Play for Work whose application is configured to restrict distribution to the enterprise domain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/deobfuscationFiles/{deobfuscationFileType}
endpoints.description: Uploads the deobfuscation file of the specified APK. If a deobfuscation or symbolication file already exists, it will be replaced. See https://developer.android.com/studio/build/shrink-code to learn more about deobfuscation files.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEOBFUSCATIONFILETYPE}} with a real deobfuscationfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/expansionFiles/{expansionFileType}
endpoints.description: Fetches the Expansion File configuration for the APK specified.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPANSIONFILETYPE}} with a real expansionfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/expansionFiles/{expansionFileType}
endpoints.description: Uploads and attaches a new Expansion File to the APK specified.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPANSIONFILETYPE}} with a real expansionfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: PUT /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/expansionFiles/{expansionFileType}
endpoints.description: Updates the APK's Expansion File configuration to reference another APK's Expansion Files. To add a new Expansion File use the Upload method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPANSIONFILETYPE}} with a real expansionfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/expansionFiles/{expansionFileType}
endpoints.description: Updates the APK's Expansion File configuration to reference another APK's Expansion Files. To add a new Expansion File use the Upload method. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPANSIONFILETYPE}} with a real expansionfiletype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/listings
endpoints.description: Lists all the APK-specific localized listings for a specified APK.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/listings
endpoints.description: Deletes all the APK-specific localized listings for a specified APK.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Fetches the APK-specific localized listing for a specified APK and language code.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: PUT /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Updates or creates the APK-specific localized listing for a specified APK and language code.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Deletes the APK-specific localized listing for a specified APK and language code.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/apks/{apkVersionCode}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Updates or creates the APK-specific localized listing for a specified APK and language code. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{APKVERSIONCODE}} with a real apkversioncode. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/bundles
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/bundles
endpoints.description: Uploads a new Android App Bundle to this edit. If you are using the Google API client libraries, please increase the timeout of the http request before calling this endpoint (a timeout of 2 minutes is recommended). See: https://developers.google.com/api-client-library/java/google-api-java-client/errors for an example in java.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/details
endpoints.description: Fetches app details for this edit. This includes the default language and developer support contact information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: PUT /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/details
endpoints.description: Updates app details for this edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/details
endpoints.description: Updates app details for this edit. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings
endpoints.description: Returns all of the localized store listings attached to this edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings
endpoints.description: Deletes all localized listings from an edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Fetches information about a localized store listing.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: PUT /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a localized store listing.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified localized store listing from an edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a localized store listing. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}/{imageType}
endpoints.description: Lists all images for the specified language and image type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{IMAGETYPE}} with a real imagetype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}/{imageType}
endpoints.description: Uploads a new image and adds it to the list of images for the specified language and image type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{IMAGETYPE}} with a real imagetype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}/{imageType}
endpoints.description: Deletes all images for the specified language and image type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{IMAGETYPE}} with a real imagetype. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/listings/{language}/{imageType}/{imageId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the image (specified by id) from the edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{IMAGEID}} with a real imageid. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language. Replace {{IMAGETYPE}} with a real imagetype.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/testers/{track}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: PUT /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/testers/{track}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/testers/{track}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/tracks
endpoints.description: Lists all the track configurations for this edit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/tracks/{track}
endpoints.description: Fetches the track configuration for the specified track type. Includes the APK version codes that are in this track.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: PUT /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/tracks/{track}
endpoints.description: Updates the track configuration for the specified track type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{packageName}/edits/{editId}/tracks/{track}
endpoints.description: Updates the track configuration for the specified track type. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TRACK}} with a real track.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits/{editId}:commit
endpoints.description: Commits/applies the changes made in this edit back to the app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/edits/{editId}:validate
endpoints.description: Checks that the edit can be successfully committed. The edit's changes are not applied to the live app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EDITID}} with a real editid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/inappproducts
endpoints.description: List all the in-app products for an Android app, both subscriptions and managed in-app products..
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/inappproducts
endpoints.description: Creates a new in-app product for an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/inappproducts/{sku}
endpoints.description: Returns information about the in-app product specified.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: PUT /{packageName}/inappproducts/{sku}
endpoints.description: Updates the details of an in-app product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{packageName}/inappproducts/{sku}
endpoints.description: Delete an in-app product for an app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: PATCH /{packageName}/inappproducts/{sku}
endpoints.description: Updates the details of an in-app product. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/orders/{orderId}:refund
endpoints.description: Refund a user's subscription or in-app purchase order.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/purchases/products/{productId}/tokens/{token}
endpoints.description: Checks the purchase and consumption status of an inapp item.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}
endpoints.description: Checks whether a user's subscription purchase is valid and returns its expiry time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:cancel
endpoints.description: Cancels a user's subscription purchase. The subscription remains valid until its expiration time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:defer
endpoints.description: Defers a user's subscription purchase until a specified future expiration time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:refund
endpoints.description: Refunds a user's subscription purchase, but the subscription remains valid until its expiration time and it will continue to recur.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/purchases/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/tokens/{token}:revoke
endpoints.description: Refunds and immediately revokes a user's subscription purchase. Access to the subscription will be terminated immediately and it will stop recurring.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename. Replace {{TOKEN}} with a real token.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/purchases/voidedpurchases
endpoints.description: Lists the purchases that were canceled, refunded or charged-back.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/reviews
endpoints.description: Returns a list of reviews. Only reviews from last week will be returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: GET /{packageName}/reviews/{reviewId}
endpoints.description: Returns a single review.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REVIEWID}} with a real reviewid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.

endpoints.name: POST /{packageName}/reviews/{reviewId}:reply
endpoints.description: Reply to a single review, or update an existing reply.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{REVIEWID}} with a real reviewid. Replace {{PACKAGENAME}} with a real packagename.
